config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_LOG_BMAP
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_LOG_BMAP
config_element.description_user: Default bitmap value for FDI, ref: bitmap fdi.h

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_INDEF_DEEP_SLEEP_EN
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_INDEF_DEEP_SLEEP_EN
config_element.description_user: Switch between Deep Sleep or Indefinite Deep Sleep

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_PERIODIC_WAKE_IDLE_TIMEOUT_US
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_PERIODIC_WAKE_IDLE_TIMEOUT_US
config_element.description_user: To set the idle timer timeout for period wake infra

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_PERIODIC_WAKE_ITO_STEPS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_PERIODIC_WAKE_ITO_STEPS
config_element.description_user: To set the ITO for period wake infra

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_PERIODIC_WAKE_START_TIME_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_PERIODIC_WAKE_START_TIME_MS
config_element.description_user: To set the period traffic start time

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_PERIODIC_WAKE_IDLE_MODE_WAKE_TIME_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_PERIODIC_WAKE_IDLE_MODE_WAKE_TIME_MS
config_element.description_user: To set the idle mode wake time in periodic wake infra

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_SPECULATIVE_WAKE_TIME_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_SPECULATIVE_WAKE_TIME_MS
config_element.description_user: Mid point wake up time(in ms)

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_BMU_ERROR_RECOVERY_ENABLED
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_BMU_ERROR_RECOVERY_ENABLED
config_element.description_user: To enable or disable BMU error recovery, 1 - recovery enabled 0 - recovery disabled

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_VALUE_FG_SSID_SCAN_TYPE
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_VALUE_FG_SSID_SCAN_TYPE
config_element.description_user: scan-type to scan all ssids(0)/specific ssid(1)

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_NUM_CHANNELS_SCANNED
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_NUM_CHANNELS_SCANNED
config_element.description_user: no of channels to be scanned by default is one

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RSSI_MIN_THRESH_DEFAULT
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RSSI_MIN_THRESH_DEFAULT
config_element.description_user: default minimum threshold value of RSSI

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RSSI_MAX_THRESH_DEFAULT
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RSSI_MAX_THRESH_DEFAULT
config_element.description_user: default maximum threshold value of RSSI

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_VALUE_IMP_SSID_SCAN_TYPE
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_VALUE_IMP_SSID_SCAN_TYPE
config_element.description_user: scan-type to scan all ssids(0)/specific ssid(1)

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_INITITAL_BMPS_IDLE_PERIOD_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_INITITAL_BMPS_IDLE_PERIOD_MS
config_element.description_user: Initial interval of bmps idle timer. config NT_DEVCFG_BMPS_IDLE_TIMER_PERIOD_MS to set idle time of follow on intervals

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_FORCE_DTIM
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_FORCE_DTIM
config_element.description_user: Force DTIM value config from STA. If value greater than 0, It will replace the actual DTIM value.

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_MIN_WAKE_TIME
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_MIN_WAKE_TIME
config_element.description_user: default MIN WAKE TIME before enter to power save

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_BMPS_IDLE_TIMER_PERIOD_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_BMPS_IDLE_TIMER_PERIOD_MS
config_element.description_user: The interval of BMPS idle timer, which will take effect from second idle duration

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_SUSPEND_FRAME_IF_WAKEUP_FRAME_RECEIVED
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_SUSPEND_FRAME_IF_WAKEUP_FRAME_RECEIVED
config_element.description_user: suspend frame if wakeup frame is received

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_BASE_EARLY_RX_US
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_BASE_EARLY_RX_US
config_element.description_user: Base early RX time for beacon reception

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_BASE_BEACON_WAIT_TIME_US
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_BASE_BEACON_WAIT_TIME_US
config_element.description_user: Base beacon wait time for beacon reception in power save

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_WNM_DTIM_CONFIG
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_WNM_DTIM_CONFIG
config_element.description_user: WNM dtim sleep enable/disable/auto(enable/disable depending on proxy arp support on ap)

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_MINIMUM_SLEEP_TIME_FOR_AON
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_MINIMUM_SLEEP_TIME_FOR_AON
config_element.description_user: Configure minimum sleep time for AON

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_SLEEP_CLOCK_SELECTION_FOR_AON
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_SLEEP_CLOCK_SELECTION_FOR_AON
config_element.description_user: To select sleep clock for AON; select 0 for RC from PMIC, select 1 for XO from RFA and select 2 for XO from PMIC

config_element.name: NT_DEVGFG_THRESHOLD_WARNING_VOLTAGE_CONFIG
config_element.label: NT_DEVGFG_THRESHOLD_WARNING_VOLTAGE_CONFIG
config_element.description_user: To configure the threshold voltage level,to have a warning of low voltage

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_SYSMON_TASK_PERIODICITY_CONFIG
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_SYSMON_TASK_PERIODICITY_CONFIG
config_element.description_user: To configure the periodicity of sysmon task

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_ACCEPTABLE_TX_COUNT
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_ACCEPTABLE_TX_COUNT
config_element.description_user: To configure acceptale tx count in a idle period

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_ACCEPTABLE_RX_COUNT
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_ACCEPTABLE_RX_COUNT
config_element.description_user: To configure acceptale rx count in a idle period

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_NO_WAKE_COUNT
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_NO_WAKE_COUNT
config_element.description_user: after configured beacon receiption STA will exit sleep then go back to sleep

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_F2A_ASSERT_TIMEOUT_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_F2A_ASSERT_TIMEOUT_MS
config_element.description_user: Timeout in us, for Aria to assert A2F in response to F2A assertion

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_INTER_F2A_INTERVAL_US
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_INTER_F2A_INTERVAL_US
config_element.description_user: Minimum time in us, between F2A deassertion and subsequent F2A pulse

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_F2A_PULSE_DURATION_US
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_F2A_PULSE_DURATION_US
config_element.description_user: Duration of F2A pulse in us

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_BEACON_MISS_THR_TIME_US
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_BEACON_MISS_THR_TIME_US
config_element.description_user: To configure beacon miss threshold time in us

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_CONNECTION_WAIT_TIME_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_CONNECTION_WAIT_TIME_MS
config_element.description_user: time to wait for wifi connection after Power ON boot up

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RECONNECTION_WAIT_TIME_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RECONNECTION_WAIT_TIME_MS
config_element.description_user: time to wait for wifi reconnection after disconnection

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_WMI_COMMAND_PROCESS_TIME_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_WMI_COMMAND_PROCESS_TIME_MS
config_element.description_user: time taken to process WMI commands excluding scan and join cmd

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_SLP_CLK_CAL_POLL_TIMER_PERIOD_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_SLP_CLK_CAL_POLL_TIMER_PERIOD_MS
config_element.description_user: periodicity of sleep clock calibration poll timer in ms

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_NUM_BMPS_IDLE_INTERVALS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_NUM_BMPS_IDLE_INTERVALS
config_element.description_user: Number of consecutive idle intervals for entry to BMPS

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_SLP_MODE_SLP_CLK_CAL_ENABLE
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_SLP_MODE_SLP_CLK_CAL_ENABLE
config_element.description_user: Enable Sleep Mode Sleep Clock Calibration

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_SLP_SLOP_INTERVAL_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_SLP_SLOP_INTERVAL_MS
config_element.description_user: Granular interval of time to account for sleep slop offset

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_SLP_SLOP_STEP_US
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_SLP_SLOP_STEP_US
config_element.description_user: Slop time to be accounted for per interval time

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RE_ENTER_BMPS_DELAY_MS
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RE_ENTER_BMPS_DELAY_MS
config_element.description_user: Delation in ms for re-enter bmps

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_TWT_DTIM_CONFIG
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_TWT_DTIM_CONFIG
config_element.description_user: twt dtim sleep enable/disable/auto(enable/disable depending on proxy arp support on ap)

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_TWT_WAKEUP_TYPE
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_TWT_WAKEUP_TYPE
config_element.description_user: to set the twt wake up periodically or without period,1 signifies periodic / implicit,0 signifies aperiodic / explicit

config_element.name: NT_DEV_CFG_TWT_FLOW_TYPE
config_element.label: NT_DEV_CFG_TWT_FLOW_TYPE
config_element.description_user: to set the twt flow that is announced or unannounced,1 signifies unannounced, 0 signifies announced

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_TWT_WIFI_FW_ENABLE
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_TWT_WIFI_FW_ENABLE
config_element.description_user: enable/disable TWT feature for WiFi FW

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RMF_ENABLE
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RMF_ENABLE
config_element.description_user: disable rmf(1)/enable rmf only with cap bits(2)/enable rmf only with req bits(3)/enable rmf only with cap and req bits(4)

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_WEP40_STA_ID
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_WEP40_STA_ID
config_element.description_user: chosen sta_id for AP for wep40 cnxn

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_WEP40_KEY_STRING
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_WEP40_KEY_STRING
config_element.description_user: key used for conxn using wep40

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_IMPS_SLEEP_TIME
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_IMPS_SLEEP_TIME
config_element.description_user: default duration of imps sleep time

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_POWERSAVE_WUR_EXIT_FOR_VALID_VENDOR
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_POWERSAVE_WUR_EXIT_FOR_VALID_VENDOR
config_element.description_user: app should send wake command if it receive message from valid vendor

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_CONC_DEVICE_MODE
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_CONC_DEVICE_MODE
config_element.description_user: Default device mode chosen in ap_sta mode STA(1)/AP(0)

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RA_FAST_JUMP_THRESHOLD
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RA_FAST_JUMP_THRESHOLD
config_element.description_user: default-failure thershold at tertiary rate before fast jump is enabled

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RA_MIN_PKT_TX_THRESHOLD
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RA_MIN_PKT_TX_THRESHOLD
config_element.description_user: default-min pkts tx required to consider in next rate computation

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_BC_MC_PRIMARY_RA_IDX
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_BC_MC_PRIMARY_RA_IDX
config_element.description_user: default bc mc primay tx rate

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_BC_MC_SECONDARY_RA_IDX
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_BC_MC_SECONDARY_RA_IDX
config_element.description_user: default bc mc secondary tx rate

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_BC_MC_TERTIARY_RA_IDX
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_BC_MC_TERTIARY_RA_IDX
config_element.description_user: default bc mc tertiary tx rate

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RA_ON
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RA_ON
config_element.description_user: default- rate adoption turned ON - 1 / OFF - 0

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RA_MCS4_RX_EN
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RA_MCS4_RX_EN
config_element.description_user: MCS4 RX is enabled or not

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_CONN_CONSECUTIVE_BMISS_THRESHOLD
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_CONN_CONSECUTIVE_BMISS_THRESHOLD
config_element.description_user: default-beacon miss threshold to initiate reconnect

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_TRANSMIT_INTERRUPT_THRESHOLD_CONFIG
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_TRANSMIT_INTERRUPT_THRESHOLD_CONFIG
config_element.description_user: to configure the lowest voltage below which transmission interrupt will be triggered

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RINT_MEASUREMENT_START_THRESHOLD_CONFIG
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RINT_MEASUREMENT_START_THRESHOLD_CONFIG
config_element.description_user: config for the voltage below which Rint measurement of coin cell will be started

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RINT_MEASUREMENT_STOP_THRESHOLD_CONFIG
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RINT_MEASUREMENT_STOP_THRESHOLD_CONFIG
config_element.description_user: config for the voltage above which Rint measurement of coin cell will be stopped

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_TXOP_VBATT_AVERAGE_SAMPLES_CONFIG
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_TXOP_VBATT_AVERAGE_SAMPLES_CONFIG
config_element.description_user: after collecting (2^config) no of samples out put will be given by HKADC after TXOP

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RINT_AVERAGE_SAMPLES_CONFIG
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RINT_AVERAGE_SAMPLES_CONFIG
config_element.description_user: after collecting (2^config) no of samples out put will be given by HKADC for Rint measurement

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RINT_MEASUREMENT_WINDOW_TIME_CONFIG
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RINT_MEASUREMENT_WINDOW_TIME_CONFIG
config_element.description_user: time span for Vbatt Rint measurement window

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_RINT_MEASUREMENT_TIME_OUT_CONFIG
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_RINT_MEASUREMENT_TIME_OUT_CONFIG
config_element.description_user: if time span for Vbatt Rint measurement window expires,and the voltage does not come back to stop threshold, this much extra time is given to coin cell for recovery,after expiration of this time vbatt timeout interrupt will be triggered

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_BK_MIN_LOGCW
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_BK_MIN_LOGCW
config_element.description_user: default-cwmin in exponential form of background effort

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_BK_MAX_LOGCW
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_BK_MAX_LOGCW
config_element.description_user: default-cwmax in exponential form of background effort

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_VI_MIN_LOGCW
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_VI_MIN_LOGCW
config_element.description_user: default-cwmin in exponential form for video

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_VI_MAX_LOGCW
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_VI_MAX_LOGCW
config_element.description_user: default-cwmax in exponential form for video

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_VO_MIN_LOGCW
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_VO_MIN_LOGCW
config_element.description_user: default-cwmin in exponential form for voice

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_VO_MAX_LOGCW
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_WMMP_VO_MAX_LOGCW
config_element.description_user: default-cwmax in exponential form for voice

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_AP_P1
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_AP_P1
config_element.description_user: default-MAC address of AP first 2 bytes

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_AP_P2
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_AP_P2
config_element.description_user: default-MAC address of AP second 2 bytes

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_AP_P3
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_AP_P3
config_element.description_user: default-MAC address of AP third 2 bytes

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_STA_P1
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_STA_P1
config_element.description_user: default-MAC address of STA first 2 bytes

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_STA_P2
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_STA_P2
config_element.description_user: default-MAC address of STA second 2 bytes

config_element.name: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_STA_P3
config_element.label: NT_DEVCFG_DEFAULT_MAC_ADDR_STA_P3
config_element.description_user: default-MAC address of STA third 2 bytes

config_element.name: NT2_DEVCFG_ENABLE_DISABLE_RRAM_DXE
config_element.label: NT2_DEVCFG_ENABLE_DISABLE_RRAM_DXE
config_element.description_user: default value 1 for dxe enable 0 for disable
